reviews.comment:
Son todos unos soretes ...no te revisan nada no se que asen los que están en la fosa .un amigo que llevo el auto cuando salió a las 7 cuadras tenía todo para la tren delantero flojo y ni cuenta se dieron los de acá y los que le dieron el tren delantero se olvidó de ajustar las rotulas y los estremos

(Translated by Google)
They're all jerks... they don't check anything, I don't know what the guys in the pit are doing. A friend who brought his car in found that after seven blocks the front suspension was completely loose and the guys here didn't even notice. And the guys who did the front suspension forgot to tighten the ball joints and tie rod ends.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNdGRmX0RREAE
